data.name: Escape Dungeon 2-銀月蒼狼 蘇拉爾
data.detailed_description:
「地牢脫出II 銀月蒼狼－蘇拉爾」採用玩家走一步敵方走一步的回合制，遊戲機制上做了大量的改變，結合回合制Roguelite與弓箭傳說的升級方式，敵人與寶箱會隨機產生，多種技能隨機組合，將劇情融入遊戲裡，每次循環都有不同的體驗！
﹡此遊戲的情色部分以怪物凌辱為主！請小心購買喔～～

遊戲特色：
◇ 微Roguelite遊戲、增加遊戲的豐富性及可玩性！


◇ 20多種不同技能，每次循環都有不同的體驗！


◇ 遊戲CG比一般CG大三倍、以超大張的方式呈現、放大你想看的任何地方。


◇ CG以全live2D動畫呈現、讓你欲罷不能！
◇ live2D微互動模式、超大張CG運鏡、讓你看更融入劇情。
◇ 近30段live2D互動成人劇情動畫。
◇ 劇情融入遊戲、劇情文本約10萬字。
◇ 主角全語音呈現。
◇ 雙重CG解鎖方式、不需故意死亡也可解鎖CG。
◇ 提供遊戲幫助(獲得資源)、不需要修改器。

故事大綱：
暗大陸－桑迪拉斯王國，與卡倫魔君數百年來的戰爭，已然落幕。
戰爭結局以桑迪拉斯王國的崩毀、卡倫魔君的勝利作為結束。
性高潮後便可以逆轉時空的伊利女王失蹤，
王國最強的大法師莎莉絲淪為魔族俘虜被關押在漆黑至極的礦坑地牢中。
即使王國陷落，但殘存的反抗軍依舊在某個地方蓄勢待發，等待著反擊的狼煙。
其中，因為狙殺無數魔族而名聲顯赫，令魔族們聞風喪膽的女精靈「銀月蒼狼－蘇拉爾」，
為了逆轉桑迪拉斯王國的敗局，她決定孤身前往魔都城暗殺卡倫魔君！

＊如果有老司機只想欣賞動畫，可以到討論區看一下，會得到滿意的答案喔～～

data.short_description: 魔族們聞風喪膽的女精靈「銀月蒼狼－蘇拉爾」，孤身前往魔都城暗殺卡倫魔君！面對大量性慾強大的魔物，你必須運用蘇拉爾弓箭的遠距離攻擊將他們一一擊垮，不然就會看到超大張CG以全動畫Live2D運鏡表現，偶爾還可以參與和怪物們的互動.......
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 日文*, 韓文, 簡體中文, 俄文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64bit OS
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit OS
  • 處理器: Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2+ GHz & SSE2 support
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal capable Intel and AMD GPUs
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2+ GHz & SSE2 support
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal capable Intel and AMD GPUs
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: Escape Dungeon 2
data.detailed_description:
"Escape Dungeon II - Shunral the Silver Wolf" is a turn-based rogue-lite that improves on the mechanics of the first game. Infiltrate the Demon Lord's castle and use your bow to defeat randomly generated monsters. Collect resources, learn abilities, and craft your loadout. Experience an immersive, yet different story with each playthrough!
﹡The erotic portion of this game is dominated by monster abuse! Please buy carefully~~

Features:
- Experience every dungeon and every playthrough differently with this game's rogue-lite gameplay mechanics.


- Discover and use more than 20 different special abilities to evade and eliminate your enemies!


- Enjoy the action with the 30+ animated & interactive Live2D "action" scenes. Each scene is three times the size of a normal CG, which allows you to magnify, move around, and examine every detail!


- Unlock CGs using an alternative method. You don't have to lose on purpose every time!
- Immerse yourself in the story with a fully-voiced main character.
- Help yourself out with the built-in resource assistant. No mods or cheat programs are required!

Story
Demon Lord Qaron had defeated the Sundista Kingdom in his war of conquest. While the Queen, with her valuable time-reversal skill, remained missing, Sundista's most powerful mage Shalith was captured and locked deep inside the dungeons. Despite their losses, those loyal to the Kingdom have not yet given up hope.
Among the resistance, there is one individual whose name alone strikes fear in every demon and monster: Shunral the Silver Wolf. This elven assassin, known for eliminating countless demons and monsters, is now determined to infiltrate the Demon Lord's castle, assassinate Lord Qaron, and bring an end to their subjugation!

*Frustrated with your progress? Come to the "Discussion" area and find out an easier way to view all the animations!

data.short_description: Help Shunral infiltrate the Demon Lord's castle in this turn-based, rogue-lite adventure. Remember to keep a safe distance while eliminating his cronies with your bow and arrow. Failure to do so may result in an animated interactive experience with the local monsters.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese*, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
